description: Venus enters Gemini — relationships crave curiosity and breathable rhythm.
human_text: Venus enters Gemini, bringing curiosity and breathable rhythm to relationships. This is a time when connections benefit from light conversation and space to explore.

description: Mars in Libra squares Saturn in Capricorn — tension between pace and structure surfaces.
human_text: Mars in Libra squares Saturn in Capricorn, creating tension between pace and structure. This aspect highlights where speed meets limits and where assertiveness meets responsibility.

description: Mercury stations direct — communication and planning gradually reorganize.
human_text: Mercury stations direct, which means communication and planning gradually reorganize. Things that felt stuck begin to move forward again.

description: The Sun–Pluto conjunction highlights truth and emotional honesty.
human_text: The Sun–Pluto conjunction highlights truth and emotional honesty. This is a time when what's real comes to the surface, whether you're ready or not.

description: Mercury retraces Capricorn ↔ Sagittarius degrees — edits beat launches. Slow the flow so clarity can catch up.
human_text: Mercury retraces Capricorn and Sagittarius degrees. This retrograde window favors edits over launches—slow the flow so clarity can catch up with action.

description: Mars backs through Leo into Cancer — assertiveness meets emotional reality. Rehearse before sprinting.
human_text: Mars backs through Leo into Cancer during the summer retrograde window. Assertiveness meets emotional reality—rehearse before sprinting, and let feelings guide action.

description: The Venus Star Point in Aries resets relational storylines. Showcase what devotion looks like now.
human_text: The Venus Star Point in Aries resets relational storylines. This is a time to showcase what devotion looks like now, and to align relationships with current values.
